command:
python -c 
import urllib.request, os

url = 'https://pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pdf/tjp0587-0819.pdf'
out = 'tasks/t0002_literature_survey_dsgc_compartmental_models/assets/paper/10.1113_jphysiol.2008.161240/files/chen_2009_dsgc-tuning.pdf'

req = urllib.request.Request(url, headers={
    'User-Agent': 'Mozilla/5.0 (research; mailto:a.nikolaev@sheffield.ac.uk)',
    'Accept': 'application/pdf,*/*',
})
with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=60) as resp, open(out, 'wb') as f:
    data = resp.read()
    f.write(data)

size = os.path.getsize(out)
print(f'Downloaded: {out}')
print(f'Size: {size:,} bytes ({size//1024} KB)')
with open(out, 'rb') as f:
    magic = f.read(4)
print(f'Magic bytes: {magic}')
print('Valid PDF:', magic == b"%PDF")
